attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
CMCT.TRANSACTION_ID,           
CMCT.CONSUMPTION_RELEASE_ID,        
CMCT.CONSUMPTION_PO_HEADER_ID,      
CMCT.CONSUMPTION_PROCESSED_FLAG,    
CMCT.REQUEST_ID,                    
CMCT.CREATED_BY ,                   
CMCT.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,        
CMCT.CREATION_DATE,                 
CMCT.PROGRAM_ID,                    
CMCT.LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
CMCT.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,           
CMCT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
CMCT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,             
CMCT.NET_QTY ,                      
CMCT.BATCH_ID,                      
CMCT.RATE ,                         
CMCT.RATE_TYPE,                     
CMCT.TAX_CODE_ID,                   
CMCT.TAX_RATE ,                     
CMCT.ERROR_CODE ,                   
CMCT.RECOVERABLE_TAX,               
CMCT.NON_RECOVERABLE_TAX ,          
CMCT.TAX_RECOVERY_RATE ,            
CMCT.PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID ,        
CMCT.CHARGE_ACCOUNT_ID,             
CMCT.VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID  ,         
CMCT.GLOBAL_AGREEMENT_FLAG,
CMCT.NEED_BY_DATE,                  
CMCT.ERROR_EXPLANATION,
CMCT.SECONDARY_NET_QTY ,            
CMCT.BLANKET_PRICE,                 
CMCT.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,            
CMCT.INTERFACE_DISTRIBUTION_REF,    
CMCT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID,         
CMCT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,            
CMCT.ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID ,           
CMCT.ORGANIZATION_ID ,              
CMCT.OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID,        
CMCT.TRANSACTION_DATE ,        
'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME  ,                
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME ,              
'I' AS ACTION_CD ,                    
CMCT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,            
CMCT.REFRESH_DATETIME
FROM
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX CMCT
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate'
AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TRANSACTION_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
